items.scenario: You recently took a full-day coach trip to a historic town, booked through a local tour company. The guide was friendly and clearly knew the area well. However, the coach left almost an hour late, so the group had far less time at the old harbor than the schedule promised.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Thornton. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain what you enjoyed about the trip
Explain how the late departure affected the rest of the day
Ask what the company can do to make up for the shortened visit
items.subject: Coach trip timing

items.scenario: You are a third-year economics student applying to a summer exchange program abroad. The application requires one faculty recommendation, and the deadline is in three weeks. Professor Halloran taught two of your courses and knows your work well.
items.direction: Write an email to Professor Halloran. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain what you are applying for and why you are writing
Explain why you hope this professor will write on your behalf
Ask what materials the professor would need from you
items.subject: Recommendation letter request

items.scenario: You are hosting a board-game night at your apartment next Saturday evening. You would like to invite a close friend who recently moved across town. You are also planning to try out a new cooperative game that night.
items.direction: Write an email to Elena. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain what the evening will involve
Explain why you would especially like this friend to come
Ask whether they can make it and what they might bring
items.subject: Board game night invite

items.scenario: You recently bought a pair of wireless headphones that are still under warranty. After only two weeks, the right earpiece stopped producing any sound at all. You still have the receipt and the original packaging.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Okafor. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain when and where you bought the headphones
Explain what has gone wrong with them
Ask how to arrange a repair or a replacement
items.subject: Warranty claim for headphones
